description.value: You're as fickle as the inhabitants of the First World. When you use an action with both the emotion and moyishuu traits, you must immediately attune your soulfeel to a different emotion. If the action had a duration, it becomes until the end of your turn. You can attempt to keep the same emotional attunement by succeeding at a @Check[flat|dc:15], but if you fail, the frequency of the action becomes once per hour.
